TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Zhang Yixing == kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Zhang Yixing, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Zhang Yixing minkahul Changsha, Hunan na Cyukoku. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Zhang Yixing hiya ga m'engi. Zhang Yixing ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga 老九門 (2016) ru 一出好戲 (2018)
S.PHON: == zħaŋ jixiŋ == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, zħaŋ jixiŋ, s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral zħaŋ jixiŋ minkaħul ʦ~ʨħaŋs~ɕħa, ħunan na ʦ~ʨjukoku. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja zħaŋ jixiŋ ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. zħaŋ jixiŋ ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa *** (****) ru **** (****)
S.FORM: == Zhang Yixing == kawas tay 1991, ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 10, Zhang Yixing, squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Zhang Yixing minkahul Changsha, Hunan na Cyukoku. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Zhang Yixing hiya ga m'engi. Zhang Yixing ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga 老九門 (2016) ru 一出好戲 (2018)
S.PHON: == zħaŋ jixiŋ == kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, zħaŋ jixiŋ, s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral zħaŋ jixiŋ minkaħul ʦ~ʨħaŋs~ɕħa, ħunan na ʦ~ʨjukoku. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja zħaŋ jixiŋ ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. zħaŋ jixiŋ ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa *** (****) ru **** (****)
